WorkflowDefinition.Name: WF_5165_UpdateMILOMA
WorkflowDefinition.Description: Mis à jour de la table MILOMA avec l'indice du numero commande associe avec le lot crée. Creation Date: 01/04/2026 Updated Date: Version: 1.0

FlowPart.Name: GetItmLot_MMS235MI
FlowPart.Description: Récuperation la reférence de la commande associé
FlowPart.IonApiMethod: {"productLogicalId":"infor.m3","operationProxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/MMS235MI","operationRestPath":"/GetItmLot","productName":"M3","operationPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/MMS235MI/GetItmLot","summary":"Display Item Lot","httpMethod":"GET","availableOutputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentType":"JSON","input":[{"wfVariableName":"ITNO","literalValue":null,"name":"ITNO","description":"Itemnumber(15)","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":true,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"BANO","literalValue":null,"name":"BANO","description":"Lotnumber(20)","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":true,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"}],"output":[{"wfVariableName":"RORC","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].RORC","optional":false},{"wfVariableName":"RORN","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].RORN","optional":false},{"wfVariableName":"RORL","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].RORL","optional":false},{"wfVariableName":"RORX","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].RORX","optional":false},{"wfVariableName":"FACI","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].FACI","optional":false}],"inputBody":{"name":null,"description":null,"required":false,"availableInputContentTypes":[],"inputContentType":null,"body":" ","ignore":true,"structureNamesFromBody":[],"variableNamesFromBody":[]}}

FlowPart.Name: GetFieldValue
FlowPart.Description: Recuperation de l'indice pour l'OF sur CUGEX1

FlowPart.Name: UpdItmLot_MMS235MI_OF
FlowPart.Description: Mis à jour champ BRE2 sur MMS235
FlowPart.IonApiMethod:
